title: Multi-anti-pattern detection: 3 bugs in navigation_mix_up
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/navigation_mix_up.ex has multiple deprecated navigation idioms. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/orders_live.ex that fixes all three families: (1) push_redirect → push_navigate, (2) live_patch/live_redirect/live_link → <.link patch/navigate=>, (3) ~L → ~H with :for/:if. Additionally, the handle_params/3 block must properly branch on the filter param (with a default _params clause). Must not leave any deprecated call.
tier_rationale: Multi-family migration. Must not miss any call site.
